funeral woman vanished after shopping Tesco will take place tomorrow.
Margaret Dorrian last seen Celbridge Straffan Road Kildare March
wearing mustard coloured jacket, blue jeans boots.
Gardai appealed public's help shared CCTV image trace whereabouts.
sadly, 53-year-old's body found earlier this week.
garda spokesman said: "The body Margaret Dorrian located afternoon March near Celbridge."
death notice reads: "Dorrian (nee McGuinness), Margaret, Temple Grove, Celbridge, Kildare late East Wall, Dublin, March 20th 2019, suddenly, deeply regretted loving husband Derek, daughters Keira Kerry, Tony, daughter-in-law Amy, grandchildren Ellen, Sean, Jade, father John, mother-in-law Mary, extended family friends.
"Reposing Oliver Reilly Ltd. Funeral Home, Leinster Maynooth Friday from 8pm.
"Funeral Mass Patrick's Church, Celbridge Saturday 11am followed cremation Newlands Cross Crematorium.
Margaret's daughter-in-law Dorrian told family were very worried when didn't return home.
Speaking after appeal been launched, said: "She down doing bits village went back into Tescos getting some shopping that last sighting her.
"Margaret didn't drive walking.
"It's very hard organise search because don't know where went from Tescos.
have idea.
